Launch Goals

-- 3 of 7 --

Launch Goals
▪ 	Money
▪ 	What most people assume a launch is about, but not
always the case
▪ 	But if it is about money (and I’ve done many launches
that were about the money) - then own it
Module One - Launch Goals
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Launch Goals
▪ 	“Save the World”
▪ 	Lots of PLF launches in this category
▪ 	This doesn’t preclude making money…
▪ 	It’s a lot easier to save the world if you can FUND your
mission
